tuning_key.text: I wake up most days with feelings inside, torn apart to find what makes sense
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: The fragments you're carrying—the torn-apart feeling, the search for what makes sense—that's not confusion asking to be fixed. That's clarity arriving in its truest form, showing you exactly where you are. Today, the signal is simple: stop waiting for the scattered pieces to arrange themselves into comfort. The moment you see them scattered is the moment you're already awake. This is what you came to know.

practice.title: Name the Fragment
practice.instruction: Without moving, notice one thought, sensation, or feeling that doesn't fit with the others—name it silently in three words, nothing more.

practice.title: Hold the Contradiction
practice.instruction: Place your hand on your chest and breathe into the space where two opposite truths live at the same time (I am lost AND I am awake; I am broken AND I am whole)—stay there for three full breaths without trying to resolve it.

practice.title: Listen to the Clear Signal
practice.instruction: Close your eyes and play the echo audio for today's frequency—let it move through the fragments without organizing them, just witness what becomes visible in the silence after it ends.

archetype_tunings.The Steward: "I wake up most days with feelings inside, torn apart to find what makes sense." The Clear signal arrives through your systems as the immediate recognition of what infrastructure has always been waiting to hold. You broadcast coherence by aligning scattered operational fragments into sharp relief, revealing the unambiguous truth of what the home requires to stand.
